title: The Annual Gym Deal
scenario: A new gym is offering an annual membership for ₹24,000 paid upfront, pitched as 'just ₹2,000 a month'. The monthly-only plan costs ₹2,800. You want to get fit but have never stuck to a routine for more than a few weeks.

choices.label: Start with the monthly plan and commit to the annual deal only after three steady months
choices.lesson: Annual prepayments only save money if you actually use them. Prove the habit first, then lock in the discount.

choices.label: Pay ₹24,000 upfront to 'force' yourself to go
choices.lesson: A big upfront fee rarely creates a habit; it just risks a costly unused membership. Buy the discount once the behaviour is real.
